data.description: THE US AND IRAN REMAIN LOCKED IN A STANDOFF OVER THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ, WITH NO FIRM DEADLINE SET BY DONALD TRUMP FOR TEHRAN TO SUBMIT A NEW PROPOSAL, AS BOTH SIDES USE BLOCKADES TO GAIN LEVERAGE DURING AN EXTENDED CEASEFIRE.
First Bancorp Reports First Quarter Results

data.title: NY and IL prohibit gov't employees from insider trading on prediction markets amid rise in popularity of political prediction markets.
data.description: Government employees in the states have been prohibited from engaging in trading activities involving insider information. This move comes as prediction markets linked to political events gain traction, leading to a heightened concern about potential misuse of privileged information. The ban aims to address this issue and ensure transparency and fairness in trading practices.

data.title: Getty Images to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: New York, April 22, 2026 - Getty Images Holdings, Inc., a leading global visual content creator and marketplace, will be reporting its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company, listed as GETY on the NYSE, will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results with investors and analysts. This announcement was made today, indicating a keen interest in informing stakeholders about the performance and progress of Getty Images in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Tigo Energy Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. ET
data.description: In Los Gatos, California, Tigo Energy Inc. (Nasdaq: TYGO), a top provider of smart solar and energy software solutions, will conduct a conference call on May 5, 2026. The call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern time (1:30 p.m. Pacific time) to review financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. Before the call, a press release containing financial results will be published. The presentation will be led by Tigo management, and a Q&A session will follow.

data.title: Waste Connections Announces Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Toronto, Waste Connections, Inc. (TSX/NYSE: WCN) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 U.S. per common share. The dividend payment is scheduled for May 21, 2026, for shareholders of record as of May 6, 2026. The Board plans to reassess the dividend each October, aiming to raise the amount in the long run.

data.title: Costa Rica Brings Together Country Brand Leaders at CIMAP 2026 Pre-Forum, Showcasing Global Leadership in Sustainability
data.description: Representatives from 11 nations have convened in San José to enhance their country brand strategies, with a specific emphasis on sustainability and competitiveness. Costa Rica is showcasing a model of development that successfully merges economic advancement with renowned environmental stewardship on a global scale.

data.title: Energy company Kinder Morgan announces Q1 2026 financial results, showcasing strong performance.
data.description: In an ongoing study, researchers have found that approximately 25% of individuals aged 18-34 have reported experiencing symptoms related to mental health issues. The study, which surveyed over 2,000 participants across various regions, also revealed that 40% of those surveyed had sought professional help for their mental health concerns. Additionally, it was discovered that only 15% of respondents had adequate mental health support in the workplace. These findings underscore the pressing need for improved mental health resources and support, particularly among younger demographics.

data.title: Remitly to Report First Quarter Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Remitly Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: RELY) revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter financial results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. The company, known for its borderless financial services, will conduct a conference call and live webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results and engage with financial analysts. The call and webcast details will be available for interested parties to access.

data.title: Palladyne AI Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: In Salt Lake City, Palladyne AI has disclosed plans for a conference call and webcast to review the financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during the initial months of the fiscal year. Interested parties can participate in the conference call and webcast to learn more about Palladyne AI's financial standing.

data.title: NextNRG Launches Mobile Fuel Delivery in Gainesville, Florida Through EzFill Division
data.description: A company has expanded its presence in Florida by incorporating one of the largest last-mile delivery stations in the nation into its service network. This move has significantly increased the company's footprint in Florida, enhancing its delivery capabilities and efficiency in the region. The addition of this new delivery station is expected to boost the company’s capacity to handle a larger volume of deliveries, further cementing its position in the market. This strategic expansion aids in meeting the growing demand for efficient and reliable delivery services in the state.

data.title: ATN International to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: Beverly, Massachusetts-based ATN International, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATNI), a prominent digital infrastructure and communications services provider, is set to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call is scheduled for May 7th, starting at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into the performance highlights.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro Announces Timing of Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Webcast
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Marysville, the Scotts Miracle-Gro Company (NYSE: SMG), a top marketer of branded consumer lawn and garden products in North America, announced its plans to unveil its second quarter financial numbers on April 29, 2026, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company will conduct a video presentation through webcast at 8:15 a.m. ET to review these results, and this will be succeeded by an audio Q&A session.

data.title: SEI Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Oaks, Pennsylvania on April 22, 2026, SEI Investments Company shared its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026. In comparison to Q1 2025, the company observed a 20% rise in EPS, while revenue and operating income experienced growth of 13% and 21%, respectively. These positive figures point towards a strong performance for SEI Investments during this period.

data.title: TI reports first quarter 2026 financial results and shareholder returns
data.description: A conference call will take place today at 3:30 p.m. Central time accessible at ti.com/ir. On April 22, 2026, Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) disclosed its first quarter financial results. The company reported a revenue of $4.83 billion, net income of $1.55 billion, and earnings per share of $1.68.

data.title: GRAIL to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: A healthcare company located in Menlo Park, California, GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL), stated on April 22, 2026, its dedication to the early detection of cancer for effective treatment. The company is set to disclose its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026 after the market closes on Tuesday, May ___.

data.title: AMGEN ANNOUNCES RETIREMENT OF DAVID M. REESE, EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT AND CHIEF TECHNOLOGY OFFICER
data.description: Amgen, headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California, revealed that their Chief Technology Officer, Dr. David M. Reese, will retire on June 30, 2026. This move reflects the company's commitment to bolstering the intersection of biology and technology. Amgen, listed on NASDAQ as AMGN, made public this personnel change on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Trading Technologies to Provide Connectivity to NZX, the National Stock Exchange of New Zealand
data.description: In an announcement made in Chicago on April 22, 2026, Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a leading provider of global capital markets technology platform services, revealed its partnership with NZX to aid in the launch of the eagerly awaited S&P/NZX 20 Index Futures contract. This collaboration is expected to have a significant impact on the trading landscape and market opportunities, with both entities working together to boost participation and facilitate market growth.
